description: Add JSDoc documentation comments to all functions and components in app/brew/ directory (actions, components, hooks, types, business logic, equipment, feedback, parameters, onboarding, quick brew)
steps: Add JSDoc to app/brew/actions.ts - document setTestDatabase, getDatabase, getModels, getPreviousBrews, saveBrew
Add JSDoc to app/brew/enhanced-actions.ts - document all exported functions
Add JSDoc to app/brew/quickBrewActions.ts - document all exported functions
Add JSDoc to app/brew/constants.ts - document exported constants if any functions
Add JSDoc to app/brew/types.ts - document interfaces/types with function signatures
Add JSDoc to app/brew/useForm.ts - document the custom hook
Add JSDoc to app/brew/usePreviousBrews.ts - document the custom hook
Add JSDoc to app/brew/useStepNavigation.ts - document the custom hook
Add JSDoc to app/brew/BeanSelector.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/BrewingParameters.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/BrewingWorkflow.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/FormWrapper.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/IntegratedVerticalStepper.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/QuickBrew.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/Step.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/page.tsx - document the page component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/equipment/actions.ts - document all functions
Add JSDoc to app/brew/equipment/grinderActions.ts - document all functions
Add JSDoc to app/brew/equipment/useGrinderSettings.ts - document the hook
Add JSDoc to app/brew/feedback/BrewRating.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/feedback/BrewSuggestions.ts - document generateBrewSuggestions function
Add JSDoc to app/brew/feedback/ShareableBrew.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/feedback/actions.ts - document all functions
Add JSDoc to app/brew/feedback/types.ts - document types/interfaces if containing functions
Add JSDoc to app/brew/parameters/GrindSettingInput.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/parameters/Recipe.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/parameters/types.ts - document types
Add JSDoc to app/brew/onboarding/OnboardingWizard.tsx - document the component and its handler functions
Add JSDoc to app/brew/[id]/actions.ts - document all server actions
Add JSDoc to app/brew/[id]/page.tsx - document the page component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/[id]/SharedBrewFeedback.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/[id]/types.ts - document types
Add JSDoc to app/brew/[id]/rate/page.tsx - document the page component
Add JSDoc to app/brew/[id]/timer/page.tsx - document the page component
acceptance_criteria: Every exported function, component, hook, and class in app/brew/ has a JSDoc comment
JSDoc comments describe purpose, parameters where relevant, and return values
pnpm type-check still passes after changes
findings: All functions, components, hooks, interfaces, and exported constants documented. The feedback/types.ts file was empty so no changes needed there. Type-check passes cleanly.
